title: Running Training — Science Reference
summary: Running Training — Science Reference --- ## Pace and Threshold ### rFTP (Running Functional Threshold Pace) The pace sustainable for approximately 60 minutes — equivalent to lactate threshold. Expressed in seconds per kilometre. Typical test: 30-minute time trial.

claims.text: Running Training — Science Reference --- ## Pace and Threshold ### rFTP (Running Functional Threshold Pace) The pace sustainable for approximately 60 minutes — equivalent to lactate threshold.
rFTP = average pace for the full 30min (not 95% correction, unlike cycling — running uses the full effort).
